task: Find the race time for who wins the first place in the last race of the 2023 Formula 1 (F1).
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct ESPN page for the final race of the 2023 Formula 1 season: '2023 Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix F1 Final Results - ESPN' at https://www.espn.com/f1/race/_/id/600026790. The page snapshot explicitly shows 'Race Winner Max Verstappen 1:27:02.624' and the positions list confirms Verstappen in 1st with time 1:27:02.624. This directly answers the task asking for the race time of the first-place winner in the last 2023 F1 race.
final_result_response: The last 2023 F1 race was the Abu Dhabi GP. ESPN lists the winner as Max Verstappen with a race time of 1:27:02.624. <citation refs="search_a779a659fd234249bbfe865458122913#3">“Race Winner Max Verstappen 1:27:02.624”</citation>

Searching ESPN for F1 results: await page.locator('e17').click();
Entering search query: await page.locator('e274').fill('2023 Formula 1 final race results Abu Dhabi ESPN');
